title: Forgejo API Vocabulary
description: Terms, tags, and model names from the Forgejo REST API specification

models.APIError: APIError is an api error with a message
models.ActionArtifact: ActionArtifact represents an artifact of a workflow run
models.ActionRunJob: ActionRunJob represents a job of a run
models.ActionVariable: ActionVariable return value of the query API
models.AddCollaboratorOption: AddCollaboratorOption options when adding a user as a collaborator of a repository
models.AddTimeOption: AddTimeOption options for adding time to an issue
models.AnnotatedTagObject: AnnotatedTagObject contains meta information of the tag object
models.BranchProtection: BranchProtection represents a branch protection for a repository
models.ChangeFileOperation: ChangeFileOperation for creating, updating or deleting a file
models.ChangeFilesOptions:
ChangeFilesOptions options for creating, updating or deleting multiple files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)
models.ChangedFile: ChangedFile store information about files affected by the pull request
models.CombinedStatus: CombinedStatus holds the combined state of several statuses for a single commit
models.Comment: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue
models.CommitAffectedFiles: CommitAffectedFiles store information about files affected by the commit
models.CommitDateOptions: CommitDateOptions store dates for GIT_AUTHOR_DATE and GIT_COMMITTER_DATE
models.CommitStats: CommitStats is statistics for a RepoCommit
models.CommitStatus: CommitStatus holds a single status of a single Commit
models.CommitStatusState:
CommitStatusState holds the state of a CommitStatus
It can be "pending", "success", "error", "failure", "warning", or "skipped"
models.ContentsResponse: ContentsResponse contains information about a repo's entry's (dir, file, symlink, submodule) metadata and content
models.CreateAccessTokenOption: CreateAccessTokenOption options when create access token
models.CreateBranchProtectionOption: CreateBranchProtectionOption options for creating a branch protection
models.CreateBranchRepoOption: CreateBranchRepoOption options when creating a branch in a repository
models.CreateEmailOption: CreateEmailOption options when creating email addresses
models.CreateFileOptions:
CreateFileOptions options for creating files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)
models.CreateForkOption: CreateForkOption options for creating a fork
models.CreateGPGKeyOption: CreateGPGKeyOption options create user GPG key
models.CreateHookOption: CreateHookOption options when create a hook
models.CreateHookOptionConfig:
CreateHookOptionConfig has all config options in it
required are "content_type" and "url" Required
models.CreateIssueCommentOption: CreateIssueCommentOption options for creating a comment on an issue
models.CreateIssueOption: CreateIssueOption options to create one issue
models.CreateKeyOption: CreateKeyOption options when creating a key
models.CreateLabelOption: CreateLabelOption options for creating a label
models.CreateMilestoneOption: CreateMilestoneOption options for creating a milestone
models.CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions: CreateOAuth2ApplicationOptions holds options to create an oauth2 application
models.CreateOrgOption: CreateOrgOption options for creating an organization
models.CreatePullRequestOption: CreatePullRequestOption options when creating a pull request
models.CreatePullReviewComment: CreatePullReviewComment represent a review comment for creation api
models.CreatePullReviewOptions: CreatePullReviewOptions are options to create a pull review
models.CreateQuotaGroupOptions: CreateQutaGroupOptions represents the options for creating a quota group
models.CreateQuotaRuleOptions: CreateQuotaRuleOptions represents the options for creating a quota rule
models.CreateReleaseOption: CreateReleaseOption options when creating a release
models.CreateStatusOption: CreateStatusOption holds the information needed to create a new CommitStatus for a Commit
models.CreateTagOption: CreateTagOption options when creating a tag
models.CreateTagProtectionOption: CreateTagProtectionOption options for creating a tag protection
models.CreateTeamOption: CreateTeamOption options for creating a team
models.DeleteEmailOption: DeleteEmailOption options when deleting email addresses
models.DeleteFileOptions:
DeleteFileOptions options for deleting files (used for other File structs below)
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)
models.DeleteLabelsOption: DeleteLabelOption options for deleting a label
models.DismissPullReviewOptions: DismissPullReviewOptions are options to dismiss a pull review
models.DispatchWorkflowOption: DispatchWorkflowOption options when dispatching a workflow
models.Duration:
A Duration represents the elapsed time between two instants
as an int64 nanosecond count. The representation limits the
largest representable duration to approximately 290 years.
models.EditBranchProtectionOption: EditBranchProtectionOption options for editing a branch protection
models.EditDeadlineOption: EditDeadlineOption options for creating a deadline
models.EditGitHookOption: EditGitHookOption options when modifying one Git hook
models.EditHookOption: EditHookOption options when modify one hook
models.EditIssueCommentOption: EditIssueCommentOption options for editing a comment
models.EditIssueOption: EditIssueOption options for editing an issue
models.EditLabelOption: EditLabelOption options for editing a label
models.EditMilestoneOption: EditMilestoneOption options for editing a milestone
models.EditOrgOption: EditOrgOption options for editing an organization
models.EditPullRequestOption: EditPullRequestOption options when modify pull request
models.EditQuotaRuleOptions: EditQuotaRuleOptions represents the options for editing a quota rule
models.EditReleaseOption: EditReleaseOption options when editing a release
models.EditRepoOption: EditRepoOption options when editing a repository's properties
models.EditTagProtectionOption: EditTagProtectionOption options for editing a tag protection
models.EditTeamOption: EditTeamOption options for editing a team
models.Email: Email an email address belonging to a user
models.ExternalTracker: ExternalTracker represents settings for external tracker
models.ExternalWiki: ExternalWiki represents setting for external wiki
models.FileDeleteResponse: FileDeleteResponse contains information about a repo's file that was deleted
models.FileLinksResponse: FileLinksResponse contains the links for a repo's file
models.FileResponse: FileResponse contains information about a repo's file
models.FilesResponse: FilesResponse contains information about multiple files from a repo
models.GPGKey: GPGKey a user GPG key to sign commit and tag in repository
models.GPGKeyEmail: GPGKeyEmail an email attached to a GPGKey
models.GeneralAPISettings: GeneralAPISettings contains global api settings exposed by it
models.GeneralAttachmentSettings: GeneralAttachmentSettings contains global Attachment settings exposed by API
models.GeneralRepoSettings: GeneralRepoSettings contains global repository settings exposed by API
models.GeneralUISettings: GeneralUISettings contains global ui settings exposed by API
models.GenerateRepoOption: GenerateRepoOption options when creating repository using a template
models.GitHook: GitHook represents a Git repository hook
models.GitignoreTemplateInfo: GitignoreTemplateInfo name and text of a gitignore template
models.Hook: Hook a hook is a web hook when one repository changed
models.Identity: Identity for a person's identity like an author or committer
models.InternalTracker: InternalTracker represents settings for internal tracker
models.Issue: Issue represents an issue in a repository
models.IssueFormFieldVisible: IssueFormFieldVisible defines issue form field visible
models.IssueTemplate: IssueTemplate represents an issue template for a repository
models.Label: Label a label to an issue or a pr
models.LabelTemplate: LabelTemplate info of a Label template
models.LicenseTemplateInfo: LicensesInfo contains information about a License
models.LicensesTemplateListEntry: LicensesListEntry is used for the API
models.ListActionRunResponse: ListActionRunResponse return a list of ActionRun
models.MergePullRequestOption: MergePullRequestForm form for merging Pull Request
models.MigrateRepoOptions:
MigrateRepoOptions options for migrating repository's
this is used to interact with api v1
models.Milestone: Milestone milestone is a collection of issues on one repository
models.NewIssuePinsAllowed: NewIssuePinsAllowed represents an API response that says if new Issue Pins are allowed
models.NodeInfo: NodeInfo contains standardized way of exposing metadata about a server running one of the distributed social networks
models.NodeInfoServices: NodeInfoServices contains the third party sites this server can connect to via their application API
models.NodeInfoSoftware: NodeInfoSoftware contains Metadata about server software in use
models.NodeInfoUsage: NodeInfoUsage contains usage statistics for this server
models.NodeInfoUsageUsers: NodeInfoUsageUsers contains statistics about the users of this server
models.Note: Note contains information related to a git note
models.NotifySubjectType: NotifySubjectType represent type of notification subject
models.OrganizationPermissions: OrganizationPermissions list different users permissions on an organization
models.PayloadCommitVerification: PayloadCommitVerification represents the GPG verification of a commit
models.PayloadUser: PayloadUser represents the author or committer of a commit
models.Permission: Permission represents a set of permissions
models.PublicKey: PublicKey publickey is a user key to push code to repository
models.PullRequestMeta: PullRequestMeta PR info if an issue is a PR
models.PullReview: PullReview represents a pull request review
models.PullReviewComment: PullReviewComment represents a comment on a pull request review
models.PullReviewRequestOptions: PullReviewRequestOptions are options to add or remove pull review requests
models.PushMirror: PushMirror represents information of a push mirror
models.QuotaGroupList: QuotaGroupList represents a list of quota groups
models.QuotaInfo: QuotaInfo represents information about a user's quota
models.QuotaRuleInfo: QuotaRuleInfo contains information about a quota rule
models.QuotaUsed: QuotaUsed represents the quota usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedArtifact: QuotaUsedArtifact represents an artifact counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedArtifactList: QuotaUsedArtifactList represents a list of artifacts counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedAttachment: QuotaUsedAttachment represents an attachment counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedAttachmentList: QuotaUsedAttachmentList represents a list of attachment counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedPackage: QuotaUsedPackage represents a package counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedPackageList: QuotaUsedPackageList represents a list of packages counting towards a user's quota
models.QuotaUsedSize: QuotaUsedSize represents the size-based quota usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedSizeAssets: QuotaUsedSizeAssets represents the size-based asset usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedSizeAssetsAttachments: QuotaUsedSizeAssetsAttachments represents the size-based attachment quota usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedSizeAssetsPackages: QuotaUsedSizeAssetsPackages represents the size-based package quota usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedSizeGit: QuotaUsedSizeGit represents the size-based git (lfs) quota usage of a user
models.QuotaUsedSizeRepos: QuotaUsedSizeRepos represents the size-based repository quota usage of a user
models.RegistrationToken: RegistrationToken is a string used to register a runner with a server
models.RenameOrgOption: RenameOrgOption options when renaming an organization
models.RenameUserOption: RenameUserOption options when renaming a user
models.ReplaceFlagsOption: ReplaceFlagsOption options when replacing the flags of a repository
models.RepoCollaboratorPermission: RepoCollaboratorPermission to get repository permission for a collaborator
models.RepoTopicOptions: RepoTopicOptions a collection of repo topic names
models.RepoTransfer: RepoTransfer represents a pending repo transfer
models.SearchResults: SearchResults results of a successful search
models.ServerVersion: ServerVersion wraps the version of the server
models.SetUserQuotaGroupsOptions: SetUserQuotaGroupsOptions represents the quota groups of a user
models.SubmitPullReviewOptions: SubmitPullReviewOptions are options to submit a pending pull review
models.SyncForkInfo: SyncForkInfo information about syncing a fork
models.TagArchiveDownloadCount: TagArchiveDownloadCount counts how many times a archive was downloaded
models.Team: Team represents a team in an organization
models.TimelineComment: TimelineComment represents a timeline comment (comment of any type) on a commit or issue
models.TopicName: TopicName a list of repo topic names
models.TrackedTime: TrackedTime worked time for an issue / pr
models.TransferRepoOption: TransferRepoOption options when transfer a repository's ownership
models.UpdateBranchRepoOption: UpdateBranchRepoOption options when updating a branch in a repository
models.UpdateFileOptions:
UpdateFileOptions options for updating files
Note: `author` and `committer` are optional (if only one is given, it will be used for the other, otherwise the authenticated user will be used)
models.UpdateRepoAvatarOption: UpdateRepoAvatarUserOption options when updating the repo avatar
models.UpdateUserAvatarOption: UpdateUserAvatarUserOption options when updating the user avatar
models.UserHeatmapData: UserHeatmapData represents the data needed to create a heatmap
models.UserSettingsOptions: UserSettingsOptions represents options to change user settings
models.VerifyGPGKeyOption: VerifyGPGKeyOption options verifies user GPG key
models.WatchInfo: WatchInfo represents an API watch status of one repository
